key_points: Manufacturing industries promote economic development by increasing production and exports
Balanced industrial growth helps reduce regional economic inequalities
The iron and steel industry supplies raw materials to many other industries
Industrial pollution includes air, water, land and noise pollution
Sustainable industrial development balances economic growth with environmental protection
examples: Thermal pollution occurs when hot water from factories enters rivers
Electrostatic precipitators remove dust particles from industrial smoke
NTPC power plants implement environmental management systems
formulas: Sustainable development = Economic growth + Environmental protection
exam_tips: Explain reasons for industrial location with examples
Prepare differences between agro-based and mineral-based industries
Learn pollution control measures used in industries
Write answers linking industry, environment and sustainable development
